title: Document-Model Attribute Spec Production Contract
summary: Format-neutral rules an attribute spec must satisfy after parsing. Both USDA and USDC mapping productions cite this contract.

custom.required: always emitted; true only when the source authored a custom declaration

variability.required: always emitted; defaults to varying when the source omits an explicit variability declaration. Storage is a native enum/domain value.

typeName.required: always emitted on a declared attribute; the value includes any array-suffix encoding for typed arrays (e.g. 'float[]')

default.required: only when authored; value type must agree with typeName when typeName names a known foundational type. None authored value stores a value-block sentinel.
default.value_shape: scalar, vector, matrix, dictionary, semantic-alias-tagged, or value-block. Native FieldValue payload, not raw JSON.

connectionPaths.required: only when authored; connections are stored as authored target listOps and are not resolved by the parser

timeSamples.value_shape: native map keyed by numeric time ordinates; each value is a FieldValue or value-block sentinel. Storage must not be a string-keyed JSON dictionary; string keys are canonical dump output only. Sample values must agree with the attribute typeName when the type is known. Samples are stored as authored layer data; the parser does not interpolate.

spline.value_shape: native Spline record retaining curve type, extrapolation, loop, knots, tangents, interpolation mode, and custom-data authoring. Storage must not be a Python dict/list payload, std::map<string, Json>, or canonical dump object tree. Spline value type must agree with typeName when known.

excluded_fields.policy: Strict AOUSD §7.6 conformance. The §7.6.4.4 Deprecated and §7.6.4.3 Out of Scope attribute fields are NOT in the live field set: they are recognized as reserved spec tokens and rejected (ForbiddenFieldOnSpecKind). arraySizeConstraint and limits are removed outright — they have no AOUSD basis and are not OpenUSD field keys either.

removed_no_spec_basis.note: Not present in the AOUSD spec and not an OpenUSD field key; removed outright.

listop_subfield_rules.single_item_is_explicit: A single connection path authored without an explicit listOp prefix produces an explicit listOp containing that one path.
listop_subfield_rules.none_is_empty_explicit: A None authored connection produces an empty listOp on the named subfield.

laws: attribute specs must carry custom, variability, and typeName as the format-neutral required field set (defaults: custom=false, variability=varying)
variability is a native EnumVariability value (varying/uniform), never a durable string
default value type must be coercible to typeName when typeName names a known foundational type; mismatch is a diagnostic
None authored default stores a value-block sentinel
timeSamples is a native time→FieldValue map; string-keyed storage is forbidden
spline data is parsed and stored but never evaluated by this layer
connectionPaths are authored target listOps; resolution is composition behavior and not evaluated by the parser

an attribute spec admits only its admitted field set (common-metadata#spec_kind_field_admission: shared + attribute_only + custom); a field belonging to another spec kind is rejected and must not be interned as an extension field (common-metadata#extension_field_rule)
golden_groups: scalar, tuple, array, matrix, dictionary, and semantic alias defaults
timeSamples with numeric keys and value-block sentinels
spline storage with duplicate item last-one-wins
